**What this changes:**
Brief description of what the PR does.

**Why:**
What problem this solves, or what improvement it makes. Link related issues with `Fixes #123` or `Refs #123`.

**How I tested it:**
What you did to verify the change works. Affected pages, workflows, edge cases checked.

**Screenshots / recordings:**
If the change is visible in the UI.

**Checklist:**
- [ ] Tested locally with `npm run dev`
- [ ] No console errors or warnings introduced
- [ ] Existing workflows still work
- [ ] Updated README if behavior or setup changed
